title: The Role of Biomarkers in Psychiatry.
author_string: Lozupone, Madia, La Montagna, Maddalena, D'Urso, Francesca, Daniele, Antonio, Greco, Antonio et al.
journal_full: Advances in experimental medicine and biology
abstract: Psychiatric illnesses are cognitive and behavioral disorders of the brain. At present, psychiatric diagnosis is based on DSM-5 criteria. Even if endophenotype specificity for psychiatric disorders is discussed, it is difficult to study and identify psychiatric biomarkers to support diagnosis, prognosis, or clinical response to treatment. This chapter investigates the innovative biomarkers of psychiatric diseases for diagnosis and personalized treatment, in particular post-genomic data and proteomic analyses.
